reviews.comment:
Excelente, siendo o no socio muy muy buena atención, posee un gran parque para despejarse o disfrutar de unos mates , Tiene un salón de ventas y bar y muy recomendable los sanwich de jamón crudo y otros  son muy buenos y posee lugar dentro con aire acondicionado,. Para los socios nos hacen 10 de descuento y 5 en combustible,   se destaca la atención del personal y los servicios del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, whether you're a member or not, the service is very, very good. It has a large park to relax or enjoy some mate. There's a sales area and bar, and the prosciutto sandwiches and others are highly recommended. It also has an air-conditioned indoor area. Members get a 10% discount and 5% off fuel. The staff's attention and the ACA's services are outstanding.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndHNlYXdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
De camino a Córdoba pase a cargar combustible acá,más que tranquilo el lugar y rápida la atención,casi siempre es poca la gente que va así que muy bien,aparte los sándwiches son espectaculares,todo bien casero.

(Translated by Google)
On my way to Cordoba I stopped to refuel here, the place is very quiet and the service is fast, there are almost always few people so very good, besides the sandwiches are spectacular, everything is homemade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBLWMzRmtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En nuestros viajes a Córdoba, tanto de ida como de vuelta, nos corremos hasta el ACA Tortugas para reponer combustible, descansar y por supuesto - IMPERDIBLE - el sándwich de Jamón Crudo y Queso con pan francés  que te hará sentir, como a nosotros, la imperiosa necesidad de pasar por el ACA Tortugas y pedir ese sándwich.

(Translated by Google)
On our trips to Córdoba, both going and coming back, we make a point of stopping at the ACA Tortugas to refuel, rest and of course - UNMISSABLE - the Prosciutto and Cheese sandwich with French bread that will make you feel, as we did, the irresistible need to stop by the ACA Tortugas and order that sandwich.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRLW9mZ2N3EAE
